body: {"program_id":"PRG001","program_hero":[{"image_url":"https://cdn.ifxsoccer.com/programs/program-hero.webp","image_text":"Train in Europe"}],"program_title":"International Soccer Program","program_description":"A complete player development experience.","program_section":[{"section_image":"https://cdn.ifxsoccer.com/programs/section.webp","section_title":"Development","section_text":"Daily training and competitive matches.","section_order":"1"}],"program_players":[{"player_image":"https://cdn.ifxsoccer.com/programs/player.webp","player_says":"This program changed my game.","player_description":"Academy player testimonial."}],"program_details":[{"detail_title":"Included","detail_text":"Training, housing and support.","detail_file":"https://cdn.ifxsoccer.com/programs/details.pdf"}],"program_variations":[{"variations_description":"Two week program","variations_dates":"2026-07-01 to 2026-07-14","variations_cost":"2500","variations_deadline":"2026-06-01"}],"program_addons":[{"addons_title":"Airport pickup","addons_description":"Round trip transfer service.","addons_cost":"120"}],"program_information":[{"information_title":"Program guide","information_image":"https://cdn.ifxsoccer.com/programs/info.webp","information_url":"https://ifxsoccer.com/programs"}],"program_category":"academy","program_apply":"https://ifxsoccer.com/apply","program_enabled":true,"program_status":"active","program_date":"2026-05-06"}
